values.value: I build reliable, scalable solutions on the Salesforce platform.

I'm a Senior Salesforce Technical Consultant and DevOps engineer who builds reliable, scalable solutions on the Salesforce platform. I turn complex business needs into clean, thoughtfully designed experiences — and ship them with confidence through automated, dependable delivery.

Hello! My name is Mohi and I enjoy building things that live on the web — mostly on the Salesforce platform. My interest in development started with customizing business apps, which quickly turned into a passion for crafting the polished, animated experiences that sit on top of them.
Fast-forward to today, I've had the privilege of building data-driven Experience Cloud sites, Lightning Web Components, and Apex services where content lives in records — so the people who own the words never have to wait on a deploy.
Here are a few technologies I've been working with recently:
Apex Lightning Web Components JavaScript (ES6+) SOQL & SOSL Experience Cloud (LWR) Salesforce Flow
I'm currently open to new opportunities and my inbox is always open. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll do my best to get back to you.
